title: Rogue Alpha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rogue Alpha''' was the callsign used by pilots who were temporarily added to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] when the squadron was already full.

[[Nrin Vakil]] held the position when he flew a [[T-65R X-wing reconnaissance starfighter]] with the Rogues in the campaign against [[Delak Krennel]]. [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] when he was piloting a [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter]] at [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] when a commando team was put on to the planet to monitor the activities of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''
